calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Continued To Sep-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Sauers appeared by zoom for executor.

Mr. Sauers stated that his client is an attorney in Guam, that they were making progress with the petition, but his client's office was flooded out due to a typhoon and requested a deadline to a date after Labor Day. Status on close of estate is continued to September 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Continued To Jul-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Sauers, esq., via Zoom, for F. Randall Cunliffe, Personal Representative.

At the court's query, Mr. Sauers reports that the Estate's real property sold at the end of last year and that the Estate is ready to close and asks for time to complete a petition and file it as his client frequently travels out of the country.

The matter is continued to Jul-03-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The court reminds Mr. Sauers that it will be expecting him to file either a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status of Administration prior to the continued date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods/Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
